seoTitle: Connect Monday.com to Power BI: 2026 Data Connector Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to feed Monday.com board data into Power BI Desktop using the GraphQL API for real-time dashboards and cross-functional reporting.
intro: Turning Monday.com workspace data into executive-ready dashboards means getting it into Power BI cleanly. This guide covers connecting Power BI Desktop to Monday.com's GraphQL API, transforming raw JSON payloads into query-ready tables, and scheduling refreshes so your reports stay current. It's aimed at anyone who needs to move beyond manual exports for business intelligence.

steps.heading: Get your Monday.com API token
steps.body: Locate and copy your personal developer token from your Monday.com profile settings, keeping it secure since it grants API access.

steps.heading: Choose your Power BI data source
steps.body: Open Power BI Desktop and select the Web data source or the official Monday.com connector path to start the connection.

steps.heading: Configure the GraphQL query
steps.body: Structure your query to pull specific workspace boards, groups, and columns rather than importing everything at once.

steps.heading: Parse JSON in Power Query Editor
steps.body: Use the Power Query Editor to unpack the JSON payload into clean, structured columns Power BI can work with.

steps.heading: Clean and format column types
steps.body: Correctly format Status flags, Date ranges, and Numbers columns so calculations and visuals behave as expected.

steps.heading: Set up relationships and scheduled refresh
steps.body: Create relationships between linked boards, then configure a scheduled refresh in the Power BI Service to keep dashboards synchronized.

faq.question: Do I need a developer token to connect Monday.com to Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to copy your personal API developer token from your Monday.com profile settings to authenticate the connection.

faq.question: Is this a native Power BI connector or a custom setup?
faq.answer: It uses Power BI's Web data source combined with Monday.com's GraphQL API, so some manual query configuration is involved rather than a plug-and-play connector.

faq.question: Can I connect multiple boards at once?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create relationships between separate linked project boards inside Power BI after importing each one.

faq.question: How often does the data refresh?
faq.answer: Refresh frequency depends on how you configure the scheduled semantic model refresh in the Power BI Service.
